characters.name: 陈凡
characters.description: 24岁男性外卖小哥，寸头发型，身穿蓝色外卖制服，身材中等，右手腕戴有神秘玉佩。
characters.description_en: 24-year-old Chinese male delivery rider, buzz cut hairstyle, wearing a blue delivery uniform, medium build, mysterious jade pendant on right wrist.
characters.reference_prompt: cinematic character portrait of a 24-year-old Chinese delivery man, buzz cut hairstyle, wearing a blue uniform with a helmet, sweat on face, intense expression, photorealistic, 8k, dramatic lighting. Variation for awakened state: glowing molten gold irises, golden runes glowing on skin, calm and god-like aura.

characters.name: 富二代
characters.description: 20多岁男性，身穿浮夸的名牌西装，发型整齐，身材偏瘦。
characters.description_en: Wealthy young man in his 20s, wearing a flashy designer suit, neat hairstyle, slender build.
key_features: 黑色骷髅死气(缠绕颈部)
characters.reference_prompt: cinematic medium shot of a wealthy young Chinese man, flashy expensive suit, arrogant and angry face, shouting, veins popping. Variation for horror scene: pale face, terrified expression, black smoke forming a skull shape coiling around his neck, dark atmosphere.

characters.name: 小女孩
characters.description: 小女孩，约6-8岁，穿粉色连衣裙，扎双马尾，身形娇小。
characters.description_en: Little girl, around 6-8 years old, wearing a pink dress, pigtails, small stature.
characters.reference_prompt: blurred small figure of a child in the distance, cinematic motion blur, sense of danger, low detail background character.

scenes.name: 拥堵的城市街道
scenes.description: 日落时分的繁忙都市街道，车流如织，光影斑驳。充满紧迫感。
scenes.description_en: Busy urban street at sunset, heavy traffic, dappled light and shadow. High urgency atmosphere.
scenes.reference_prompt: cinematic street view, busy Chinese city at sunset, gridlocked traffic, golden hour lighting, asphalt road, urban skyscrapers in background, motion blur, 8k, photorealistic.

scenes.name: 车祸撞击点
scenes.description: 街道的一角，柏油路面龟裂，有明显的刹车痕迹和散落的碎片。
scenes.description_en: A corner of the street, cracked asphalt, visible skid marks and scattered debris.
scenes.reference_prompt: cinematic low angle shot of cracked asphalt road, skid marks, debris floating in air, smoke and steam rising, dramatic destruction aftermath, hyper-realistic texture, 8k.

props.name: 电动车
props.description: 陈凡的送餐工具，旧款，带有外卖箱。
props.description_en: Chen Fan's delivery vehicle, worn out, equipped with a delivery box.
props.reference_prompt: close up of an electric scooter handle bars, worn texture, delivery box attached, motion blur background, realistic vehicle details.

props.name: 红色超跑
props.description: 法拉利风格的红色跑车，先是漂移，后车头严重损毁，像手风琴一样皱起。
props.description_en: Ferrari-style red sports car. First drifting, then severely damaged front, crumpled like an accordion.
props.reference_prompt: luxury red supercar, aggressive design. Variation: crumpled front hood, metal twisted, steam rising from engine, realistic car crash damage, cinematic lighting.

props.name: 玉佩
props.description: 古老的绿色玉佩，碎裂瞬间爆发出金色符文。
props.description_en: Ancient green jade pendant, exploding into golden runes at the moment of shattering.
props.reference_prompt: macro shot of a green jade pendant shattering, glowing golden magical runes emerging from the cracks, mixture of blood and jade dust, magical realism style, 8k.

props.name: 泰迪熊
props.description: 掉落在斑马线上的儿童玩具，象征无辜与危险。
props.description_en: A child's toy dropped on the crosswalk, symbolizing innocence and danger.
props.reference_prompt: close up of a lonely teddy bear lying on asphalt crosswalk, shadow of a car looming over it, dramatic lighting, emotional focus.

props.name: 智能手机
props.description: 屏幕碎裂的手机，显示扣款通知。
props.description_en: Smartphone with a cracked screen, displaying a penalty notification.
props.reference_prompt: close up of a cracked smartphone screen lying on the ground, bright red notification banner with text 'ORDER FAILED', digital glare, realistic glass texture.

title: 都市修仙：外卖小哥的逆袭
